markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Interviewing David McDowell for the Account Director role.](https://fathom.video/share/YyUr6nqsSkz8NuLvg-XRrprnHQ4HwZXh?tab=summary&timestamp=162.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Chanel Success:** David drove non-branded SEO growth by creating thousands of new PLPs, breaking a client's risk-averse culture by proving the unsustainability of a 98% branded-search reliance.](https://fathom.video/share/YyUr6nqsSkz8NuLvg-XRrprnHQ4HwZXh?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [**Strategic Approach:** David specializes in reviving stagnant accounts by first diagnosing client pain points and refining reporting, then scaling proven tactics (e.g., PLP optimization) for top-line impact.](https://fathom.video/share/YyUr6nqsSkz8NuLvg-XRrprnHQ4HwZXh?tab=summary&timestamp=1464.0)
  - [**AI/AEO Strategy:** David's approach to AI Overviews (AEO) is to prioritize foundational, "future-proof" SEO (content, feeds) while managing client expectations on traffic and tracking new KPIs like brand presence.](https://fathom.video/share/YyUr6nqsSkz8NuLvg-XRrprnHQ4HwZXh?tab=summary&timestamp=1717.0)
  - [**Role Alignment:** David is attracted to the role's pure strategy focus and the opportunity to build solutions for the content scalability problems he currently faces at his agency.](https://fathom.video/share/YyUr6nqsSkz8NuLvg-XRrprnHQ4HwZXh?tab=summary&timestamp=2049.0)

## Topics

### Chanel Project: Driving Non-Branded SEO Growth

  - [**Problem:** Chanel's organic traffic was unsustainable, relying almost entirely on branded search (98% of clicks). The client was risk-averse and focused only on branded metrics.](https://fathom.video/share/YyUr6nqsSkz8NuLvg-XRrprnHQ4HwZXh?tab=summary&timestamp=366.0)
  - [**Solution:** Proposed creating thousands of new PLPs to target non-branded, long-tail keywords (e.g., "red lipstick").](https://fathom.video/share/YyUr6nqsSkz8NuLvg-XRrprnHQ4HwZXh?tab=summary&timestamp=415.0)
  - [**Execution:**](https://fathom.video/share/YyUr6nqsSkz8NuLvg-XRrprnHQ4HwZXh?tab=summary&timestamp=445.0)
      - [**Buy-in:** Secured approval after a SERP change caused a performance dip, proving the unsustainability of the status quo.](https://fathom.video/share/YyUr6nqsSkz8NuLvg-XRrprnHQ4HwZXh?tab=summary&timestamp=642.0)
      - [**Process:** Agency handled research → vendor used product feed to auto-generate pages.](https://fathom.video/share/YyUr6nqsSkz8NuLvg-XRrprnHQ4HwZXh?tab=summary&timestamp=453.0)
  - [**Impact:**](https://fathom.video/share/YyUr6nqsSkz8NuLvg-XRrprnHQ4HwZXh?tab=summary&timestamp=488.0)
      - [**Non-Branded Growth:** Significant increases in visibility, traffic, and revenue.](https://fathom.video/share/YyUr6nqsSkz8NuLvg-XRrprnHQ4HwZXh?tab=summary&timestamp=515.0)
      - [**Branded Lift:** Also improved branded CTR, exceeding a key client goal.](https://fathom.video/share/YyUr6nqsSkz8NuLvg-XRrprnHQ4HwZXh?tab=summary&timestamp=488.0)
      - [**Expansion:** Success led to buy-in for the strategy across other site divisions.](https://fathom.video/share/YyUr6nqsSkz8NuLvg-XRrprnHQ4HwZXh?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [**Lesson Learned:** A limited product data feed required manual workarounds, reducing efficiency.](https://fathom.video/share/YyUr6nqsSkz8NuLvg-XRrprnHQ4HwZXh?tab=summary&timestamp=1009.0)

### Strategic Approach to Stagnant Accounts

  - [David specializes in reviving long-term, stagnant client accounts.](https://fathom.video/share/YyUr6nqsSkz8NuLvg-XRrprnHQ4HwZXh?tab=summary&timestamp=1464.0)
  - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/YyUr6nqsSkz8NuLvg-XRrprnHQ4HwZXh?tab=summary&timestamp=1464.0)
    1.  [**Diagnose:** Identify client pain points and the questions their internal stakeholders are asking.](https://fathom.video/share/YyUr6nqsSkz8NuLvg-XRrprnHQ4HwZXh?tab=summary&timestamp=1541.0)
    2.  [**Refine Reporting:** Adjust reporting to tell the story the client needs to hear, establishing a better baseline.](https://fathom.video/share/YyUr6nqsSkz8NuLvg-XRrprnHQ4HwZXh?tab=summary&timestamp=1541.0)
    3.  [**Scale Proven Tactics:** Shift from small, isolated optimizations (e.g., 40-50 PLPs/month) to scalable strategies for top-line impact.](https://fathom.video/share/YyUr6nqsSkz8NuLvg-XRrprnHQ4HwZXh?tab=summary&timestamp=1588.0)
    <!-- end list -->
      - [**Example (Ace Hardware):** Using AI to increase PLP output by 20-30% and applying the same optimization logic to all underlying PDPs.](https://fathom.video/share/YyUr6nqsSkz8NuLvg-XRrprnHQ4HwZXh?tab=summary&timestamp=1621.0)

### AI Overviews (AEO) Strategy

  - [**Client Education:** Reset expectations on traffic from AEO vs. traditional SERPs.](https://fathom.video/share/YyUr6nqsSkz8NuLvg-XRrprnHQ4HwZXh?tab=summary&timestamp=1764.0)
  - [**Prioritization:** Maintain focus on Google's 80-90% market share while preparing for AEO's increasing prominence.](https://fathom.video/share/YyUr6nqsSkz8NuLvg-XRrprnHQ4HwZXh?tab=summary&timestamp=1797.0)
  - [**"Future-Proofing":** Emphasize foundational SEO that benefits both traditional search and AEO.](https://fathom.video/share/YyUr6nqsSkz8NuLvg-XRrprnHQ4HwZXh?tab=summary&timestamp=1831.0)
      - [High-quality, citable content](https://fathom.video/share/YyUr6nqsSkz8NuLvg-XRrprnHQ4HwZXh?tab=summary&timestamp=1898.0)
      - [Optimized product feeds](https://fathom.video/share/YyUr6nqsSkz8NuLvg-XRrprnHQ4HwZXh?tab=summary&timestamp=1831.0)
      - [Strong local presence](https://fathom.video/share/YyUr6nqsSkz8NuLvg-XRrprnHQ4HwZXh?tab=summary&timestamp=1831.0)
  - [**Performance Measurement:**](https://fathom.video/share/YyUr6nqsSkz8NuLvg-XRrprnHQ4HwZXh?tab=summary&timestamp=1746.0)
      - [Track prompt visibility and referring traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/YyUr6nqsSkz8NuLvg-XRrprnHQ4HwZXh?tab=summary&timestamp=1746.0)
      - [Introduce new KPIs like "brand presence" in AEO responses.](https://fathom.video/share/YyUr6nqsSkz8NuLvg-XRrprnHQ4HwZXh?tab=summary&timestamp=1853.0)
      - [Differentiate strategy based on prompt type (e.g., on-page copy for product queries vs. PR for review-based prompts).](https://fathom.video/share/YyUr6nqsSkz8NuLvg-XRrprnHQ4HwZXh?tab=summary&timestamp=1898.0)

### GrowthX Vision & Service Gaps

  - [**Vision:** To be a "knowledge base for your web experience," unifying opportunity discovery, action, and data tracking in one platform.](https://fathom.video/share/YyUr6nqsSkz8NuLvg-XRrprnHQ4HwZXh?tab=summary&timestamp=2460.0)
  - [**Business Model:** A hybrid agency/product company.](https://fathom.video/share/YyUr6nqsSkz8NuLvg-XRrprnHQ4HwZXh?tab=summary&timestamp=2223.0)
      - [**Agency:** A "white glove" service model that funds product development.](https://fathom.video/share/YyUr6nqsSkz8NuLvg-XRrprnHQ4HwZXh?tab=summary&timestamp=2537.0)
      - [**Product:** Aims to create a lower-touch, self-serve model for knowledge workers.](https://fathom.video/share/YyUr6nqsSkz8NuLvg-XRrprnHQ4HwZXh?tab=summary&timestamp=2321.0)
  - [**Service Gaps:**](https://fathom.video/share/YyUr6nqsSkz8NuLvg-XRrprnHQ4HwZXh?tab=summary&timestamp=2662.0)
      - [**Off-Page SEO:** Not a core offering due to negative experiences with shady vendors. This is a potential gap, especially as PR and brand mentions influence AEO.](https://fathom.video/share/YyUr6nqsSkz8NuLvg-XRrprnHQ4HwZXh?tab=summary&timestamp=2682.0)
      - [**Video:** Not a core offering, though a talented video person is on staff for internal projects. YouTube content is a known driver for AEO, representing another potential gap.](https://fathom.video/share/YyUr6nqsSkz8NuLvg-XRrprnHQ4HwZXh?tab=summary&timestamp=2697.0)
      - [**Custom Work:** GrowthX is selective with custom projects, prioritizing repeatable, scalable offerings to avoid past issues with scope creep.](https://fathom.video/share/YyUr6nqsSkz8NuLvg-XRrprnHQ4HwZXh?tab=summary&timestamp=3016.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Kyle:** Coordinate with Tucker to schedule a case interview for David within the next week.](https://fathom.video/share/YyUr6nqsSkz8NuLvg-XRrprnHQ4HwZXh?tab=summary&timestamp=3297.0)
